title: SQLancer crash on query with HAVING
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tbl_Orders (OrderID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ProductID INTEGER, Quantity INTEGER, OrderDate TEXT);
CREATE TABLE tbl_Products (ProductID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ProductName TEXT, Price REAL);
INSERT INTO tbl_Products (ProductID, ProductName, Price) VALUES (1, 'Mobo Game', 59.99), (2, 'PKO Game', 49.99), (3, 'Shirt', 19.99), (4, 'Shorts', 15.00);
SELECT p.ProductName, SUM(o.Quantity) FROM tbl_Products p JOIN tbl_Orders o ON p.ProductID = o.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductName HAVING SUM(o.Quantity) > 0;
key_bug_features: HAVING clause in complex JOIN query
